name: Suspicious - Mixed Signals
evidence:
From: john.smith@techcompany-solutions.net
Subject: Amazon Remote Position

Hello,
We have an immediate opening for a Data Analyst at Amazon. The position offers $120k/year. To proceed, please provide your SSN and banking details for direct deposit setup.

Link: https://techcompany-solutions.net/amazon-careers

Best regards,
John Smith
key_red_flags: Request for SSN and banking details before hire
Domain does not match Amazon official domain
